description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, blued steel barrel. The rifle features a mounted telescopic scope for precision aiming, attached securely above the receiver. The stock is made from polished wood, with a smooth finish and a slight ergonomic curve for shoulder comfort. The trigger guard and bolt assembly are visible, constructed from metal, and the rifle has an internal magazine, typical of traditional hunting or military rifles. The barrel is slender and extends well beyond the wooden fore-end, with no visible muzzle device attached. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for both sporting and tactical use in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, long barrel, and mounted telescopic scope. The design is robust, with metal and wood construction and no visible muzzle device.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, metal barrel, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal barrel, and scope from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the scope's rear lens.
